overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The player character walks along wet streets reflecting cyan and magenta neon signs, crosses intersections, and observes light traffic and scattered pedestrians in a dense urban environment with towering digital billboards and corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon storefronts

events.description: exiting covered walkway and approaching yellow-striped crosswalk
beginning to cross the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing neon signs and approaching the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: walking in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: metal and glass covered walkway with green neon lighting running along the left side
bright green neon sign with 'OPEN' text and holographic figure
tall building covered in large digital advertisement screens displaying animated content
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet pavement
modern street lamp with cylindrical base and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway lined with vibrant green neon signs and holographic advertisements. The camera moves forward along wet reflective pavement, approaching a yellow-striped crosswalk. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead while distant vehicle lights are visible on the right.

events.description: stopping at the intersection to wait for traffic signal while vehicles pass in the distance
turning head to observe the surroundings while waiting at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stopped at the intersection crosswalk, observing the surroundings and waiting for the signal to change

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing at the corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with 'SAKAI' text and stylized graphics on building facade
massive screen displaying animated advertisement with pink and green colors

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a wide intersection marked by yellow crosswalk stripes. A group of NPCs stands waiting on the left near a building with a prominent 'SAKAI' neon sign. Large digital billboards tower overhead while the camera pans slightly to observe the surroundings before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate district under elevated highway with data inc signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing various storefronts and neon displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: illuminated corporate sign reading 'DATA INC' mounted on the overpass structure overhead
elevated highway or walkway with support columns and glowing cyan ceiling panels
row of shops with bright neon signs and illuminated window displays

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath an elevated overpass structure with glowing 'DATA INC' signage overhead. The sidewalk is lined with neon-lit storefronts on the left and the street on the right. The wet pavement reflects the cyan and pink neon lights from the surrounding buildings and overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with turbo corporate building and active traffic

events.description: stopping at intersection as a silver luxury sedan drives past from right to left
waiting at crosswalk as another vehicle passes through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, stopping to wait for passing vehicles, then preparing to cross

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated 'TURBO' signage in orange and white letters near the top
yellow striped pedestrian crossing with 'WAIT' text painted on the asphalt
futuristic silver sedan with illuminated accents driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches another intersection beneath the 'TURBO' corporate building. The camera stops at the crosswalk to allow a futuristic silver sedan to pass. The scene features active vehicle traffic, bright neon signage on surrounding buildings, and wet streets reflecting the city lights as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched city center, moving from a sheltered walkway into the open expanse of a bustling corporate district. It begins under a covered path lined with vibrant green neon and holographic ads, gliding across wet, reflective pavement toward a yellow-striped crosswalk. As the camera reaches a wide intersection, it pauses briefly near a prominent SAKAI sign and towering digital billboards before pushing forward beneath an elevated overpass marked by glowing DATA INC signage. The scene then shifts into a corridor of cyan and pink reflections from surrounding storefronts, eventually leading toward the imposing TURBO corporate building. Finally, the camera halts at a second crosswalk to let a futuristic silver sedan pass through the active traffic of the rain-slicked streets.
